title: Is app_subscription_renewed sent yearly for yearly billing, or monthly?
excerpt: If client has a subscription to an app with yearly billing, is app_subscription_renewed sent then only after a year, when the user is billed again? Or, maybe this event is still sent monthly?

posts.author: igsmr (Igor)
posts.cookedHtml: If client has a subscription to an app with yearly billing, is app_subscription_renewed sent then only after a year, when the user is billed again? Or, maybe this event is still sent monthly?

posts.author: zoe.sgt (Zoe | SGTLab)
posts.cookedHtml:
app_subscription_renewed only fires when the subscription actually renews based on its billing cycle.
For example, if a client starts a yearly plan on Jan 1st 2025, the event won’t be sent again until Jan 1st 2026. On a monthly plan, it would fire every month on the renewal date.
Ref: Webhooks
